channel.title: eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server
channel.description: Premium 5G eSIM connectivity with ultra-fast entertainment streaming across Myanmar and ASEAN

item.title: eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server Now Live
item.description: Premium 5G eSIM connectivity launches across Myanmar and ASEAN with Microsoft technology stack
item.content:encoded:
eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server is now live, offering premium 5G eSIM connectivity with ultra-fast entertainment streaming across Myanmar and ASEAN. Built exclusively with Microsoft technologies to serve 50 million users.

Key Features:

  • Ultra-Fast 5G connectivity up to 10Gbps
  • 4K HDR streaming with Dolby Atmos audio
  • Military-grade encryption with Microsoft Zero Trust
  • Seamless ASEAN roaming across 10 countries
  • QR code activation with Microsoft Graph integration
  • Multi-device support for all platforms

item.title: Microsoft Technology Stack Integration Complete
item.description: Azure Static Web Apps, Power Pages Pro, and Microsoft Graph Toolkit 4.5.0 now fully integrated
item.content:encoded: Complete integration of Microsoft technology stack including Azure Functions 5, Durable Functions 4, and enterprise-grade security features.

item.title: Bilingual Support with Myanmar Unicode
item.description: Full English and Myanmar Unicode support with Azure AI Translator integration
item.content:encoded: Native Myanmar Unicode support with Leelawadee UI font and real-time translation capabilities powered by Azure AI Translator.
